info.title: Hilt API
info.description: Hilt Pay Workspace and Hilt Pay API routes for zero-custody Solana USDC checkout, receipts, memberships, entitlements, native subscriptions, webhooks, and support context.

post.description: Creates a new Hilt merchant account on the free plan.
Password-based login. Returns JWT on success with full entitlement claims.

Phantom wallet-based authentication.
Verifies the signed nonce, creates or retrieves the user account.
Wallet-only accounts have no email so is_staff is always False.

Logs out the current session.
For stateless JWTs this is a no-op server-side.
Clients should discard the token locally.

Refreshes a JWT that is still valid.
Issues a new token with a fresh TTL and re-derives entitlement claims
from the database so subscription changes are reflected immediately.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's full profile for dashboard bootstrap.
This is the primary endpoint for dashboard bootstrap.

patch.description: Updates mutable fields on the user profile.

get.description:
Returns the merchant-facing dashboard summary used by the sidebar and overview.
Figures are grouped by asset so we do not collapse USDC and SOL into one fake number.

patch.description: Updates merchant email and password details for hilt.so sign-in.

delete.description:
Soft-deletes the account. Sets deleted_at timestamp and status = 'deleted'.
GDPR-compliant: user data is pseudonymised, not hard-deleted.

get.description: Lists all API keys for the authenticated user (excludes raw values).

schema.title: Response List Keys V1 Keys Get

post.description:
Creates a new API key.
The raw key value is returned ONCE and cannot be retrieved again.
Store it in a secrets manager immediately.

delete.description:
Revokes an API key. Revocation is immediate and permanent.
Requests using this key will receive HTTP 401 from the next request onwards.

post.description:
Generate a cryptographically signed Hilt receipt for a Solana transaction.

**Idempotent:** The same `tx_sig` always returns the same receipt.
Stored immutably in Postgres + Cloudflare R2. Ed25519 signed by the Hilt server key.

schema.title: Response Post Receipt V1 Receipt Post

get.description: Retrieve the full signed receipt JSON. Auth required.

schema.title: Response Get Receipt V1 Receipt  Receipt Id  Get
Response Get Public Receipt V1 Receipt  Receipt Id  Public Get

get.summary: Publicly verify a receipt's cryptographic signature
get.description:
**Public endpoint — no authentication required.**

Re-computes the SHA-256 hash of the receipt JSON and verifies the Ed25519 signature.
Returns verification result usable by auditors and third parties.

schema.title: Response Verify Receipt V1 Receipt  Receipt Id  Verify Get

get.description: Public product view — strips sensitive fields.

post.description:
Canonical checkout session initializer.

Creates one payment session / intent record and returns:
  - payment_id  — the canonical ID used by both the browser signer path and
                  the Phantom mobile path throughout the checkout flow
  - phantom_mobile.connect_url  — Phantom Universal Link for mobile app-switch
                                  signing (present only if the server has a
                                  dapp key configured)

Both execution paths (browser Phantom and mobile Phantom) share the same
payment_id and converge on the same backend confirmation + delivery pipeline.

Identity / customer reference fields are optional at session-creation time.
They must be provided by payment time (via the confirm or sign endpoints)
for products that enforce membership identity.

No API key required.
